_doc: PINNED BOOT IDENTITY — the single source of the expected md5s every gate/panel/bake/self-test asserts on entry (Guard 5, boot-store assertion). A build that boots on any other store HALTS on line one. Update ONLY at a bake, in the same commit that moves the store; verify_restore.sh, bootstrap.sh, run_panel.sh, ship_gates_check.py and one_source_selftest.py all read THIS file rather than carrying their own hardcoded hex. Origin: stale-boot hardening 2026-07-05 (workspace held baked-v2.4 644d1254 while the repo carried e1b4d8bf; the four data guards validate whichever dir they are imported from, so they never caught the wrong DIRECTORY).
_engine_head_note: v2.9 REFIT WIRING (2026-07-13): _merged_recover.py 7a07e369->2030e5df (L1 _PVC0 swap+V0/RUC rebuild / L4 MSD-excl+tripwire / L3 s(age), all env-gated default-ON) + rl_model.py 0c42d158->952ddb3d (L2 dial-14 / L5 trio-pickless + os import). ALL-GATES-OFF reproduces base byte-exact (n=804 sum=723075). Refit board de4baef9->8a66b4ba->f2d6e3f5 (export/display fields, 0 movers). v2.9 BAKE (2026-07-13): L7 NUMÉRAIRE re-base (display-only ÷1.0524) + adopted-curve repoint (pvc_curve_L1b.json, pick-1=3000) + Brodie owner override -> shipped board f2d6e3f5->81e48293. Engine ev()/store/config UNCHANGED (rebase is presentation); OFFICIAL cohort gate PASS 126.8/125.2/116.1 <=130 (ratios invariant). Candidate at the L-STOP (no tag/main until owner word).

register_note: LTI_REGISTER.md — owner-authored availability sidecar, pinned as a versioned input (R-REG=R2, Chapter-3 2026-07-09). Guard 5 asserts it on entry like the store; bootstrap seeds it to the workspace; the lookalike tripwire (single_source.py) keeps it single. Owner edits it -> this pin moves in the same commit (a curation edit, NOT a store bake).
tag: ID-PRIMARY MIGRATION candidate (clean scope) 2026-07-12 — NOT A BAKE PROMOTION (no tag, no main merge; owner word required). base = v2.8 (store 04f38dad, board 9ecbe0fa). Store MOVED 04f38dad -> b0c39d78: 804 stable_player_id (afl-player-v1-<20hex>) + affl_team + eligibilities attached (identity fields, not read by ev(), 0 board movers); 5 named DOB corrections (onley/kickett/rodriguez/driscoll _by 2000->2007/2006; mcandrew _by 1999->2000); taylor-adams marked _retired (mid-season retirement). RE-ENTRY TRIO (perez/mcandrew/keane -> pickless SSP) DEFERRED to the v2.9 lever build (owner-ruled 2026-07-12; register v11 item 11a) — it reprices 657 non-named rows via the load-time calibration refit. luke-nankervis NO-import (store PSD pick 2 stands). Engine code UNTOUCHED at the store migration (head 7a07e369) -> board de4baef9; book RE-SEALED for the new store (n re-counted). [v2.9 REFIT+BAKE 2026-07-13 rides ON this store: engine 7a07e369->2030e5df (6 env-gated levers, default-ON), board de4baef9->8a66b4ba->f2d6e3f5->81e48293 (refit -> export/display -> L7 numéraire+override BAKE, display-only), store b0c39d78 UNCHANGED; cohort gate PASS 126.8/125.2/116.1; see _engine_head_note.] Board movers vs 9ecbe0fa: 94 = 5 DOB + adams removed + 88 hairline retirement ripple (<=+/-2 SCAR, owner-declared expected).
